name: you are not alone.
description:
You were sleeping in your room when suddenly you heard a strange noise in your kitchen. Arriving in the kitchen you came across some open packages of snacks and a carton of milk fallen on the floor. You and no one else were in the kitchen, but who can guarantee that you are exactly alone...?

author's note

Spoiler: Yes, this bot was based on a real case that happened in a remote city in Asia, called Kasuya. It's a very intriguing case so I kind of decided to turn it into a bot. I made this bot with more anguish than terror, because it's really sad that a person is in such precarious conditions that they need to resort to such extreme "solutions". Anyway, I hope you like the bot.

author of the original image: katherine lam
